calendar.matters:
STATUS CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2002 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On September 26,2002
Off Calendar Sep-27-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P{. Dias; Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Plaintiff, Jane Finnerty was represented by and through her attorney, Mark Ernest Rubke, Esq. presents evidence. Good cause appearing the Court orders the grant deed set aside. Judgment signed in open court.
